texto: ... I could not bank on the phlegmatic Chinese
autor: I would have to take care of it myself. This would be safer and also consistent with my own responsibility. The latter is the anarch’s ultimate authority.
explicacao: Citação de I would have to take care of it myself. This would be safer and also consistent with my own responsibility. The latter is the anarch’s ultimate authority. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “... I could not bank on the phlegmatic Chinese” articula reflexao, ernst-junger, eumeswil em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como eumeswil.
